narrative:
York Twp township has 2,657 registered voters, with 55.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.4 percentage points.
